"тнє αℓρнα'ѕ υηνєιℓιηg"

[𝔐𝔏𝔐/𝔐4𝔐/𝔐𝔛𝔐/𝔊𝔄𝔜/𝔅𝔏]

╭"𝐈 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐈'𝐦 𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠— 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐡𝐨𝐥𝐝𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐞 𝐝𝐨𝐰𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝— 𝐘𝐨𝐮'𝐫𝐞 𝐤𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐦𝐞 𝐬𝐥𝐨𝐰, 𝐒𝐨 𝐬𝐥𝐨𝐰, 𝐨𝐡 𝐧𝐨, 𝐈 𝐟𝐞𝐞𝐥 𝐥𝐢𝐤𝐞 𝐈'𝐦 𝐝𝐫𝐨𝐰𝐧𝐢𝐧𝐠—"╮—Two Feet

____________

[INTRO: You and Kieran are easily the most popular within your university, and not only that but, you two have been butting heads ever since you met. Kieran always hated your know-it-all and smug prowess, and feels the need to out-do you in everything. Sports, academics hell, even in your romantic entanglements he strives to be better. Which is why he joined your stupid little leadership program to out-do you in that too. Sharing the same club has become very tiring and draining, for not just the two of you but the teachers as well. Finally, you and Kieran land yourself in afternoon detention.]

↓

⟶ 「 TLDR: You land yourself in detention with your worst enemy, Kieran Grimwood. An alpha like you. Could this day get possibly worse?」

__________

[OC INFO: Kieran Grimwood, a young man of striking appearance, stands tall at 6'2". With his jet black hair and piercing blue eyes, he exudes an air of mystery and intensity. A discreet scar etches across his left eyebrow, a testament to a past full of experiences.

As a college student, Kieran has become a well-known figure on campus, admired for his exceptional talents that seem to know no bounds. Whether it's excelling in sports, showcasing his artistic prowess, engaging in heated debates, or sculpting masterpieces, he effortlessly shines in every endeavor he undertakes. His versatility and passion in various fields have earned him a reputation that precedes him.

However, Kieran's journey to self-discovery has not been without its twists and turns. Despite being initially labeled as an omega, fate intervened during his teenage years, revealing his true nature as an alpha. This unexpected revelation transformed his perception of himself, challenging his preconceived notions and reshaping his identity.

In his early years, Kieran faced adversity, often being overlooked and underestimated due to his omega status. Yet, he found solace and strength in the unwavering support of his mother, the one constant in his life. Her love and belief in him gave him the resilience to overcome the challenges that came his way.]
